name: Land Flipping
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>土</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>と</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ころがし
desc: Target 1 face-up card in a Field Zone; banish it, then place it face-up in the other Field Zone, then, you can choose 1 Field Spell with a different original name in the current controller's GY, and place it face-up in the Field Zone of the player whose card was banished. You can only activate 1 "Land Flipping" per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up card in a Field Zone; banish it, then place it face-up in the other Field Zone, then, you can choose 1 Field Spell with a different original name in the current controller's GY, and place it face-up in the Field Zone of the player whose card was banished. You can only activate 1 "Land Flipping" per turn.

action: Returns banished cards to the field
Places cards from your Graveyard in your opponent's Field Zone
Places cards from your opponent's Graveyard in your Field Zone
